zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I於1267年出生在比利時迪瑟 德 納姆爾時，他的父親Guy de Dampierre42歲，母親Isabelle de Luxembourg20歲。他於1310年3月6日與Marie d'Artois在法國阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1302年登記服兵役。他於1302年被列為regent of flanders 。他去世於1330年2月24日在比利時福拉安德倫享年63歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I于1267年出生在比利时迪瑟 德 納姆爾时，他的父亲Guy de Dampierre42岁，母亲Isabelle de Luxembourg20岁。他于1310年3月6日与Marie d'Artois在法国阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1302年登记服兵役。他于1302年被列为regent of flanders 。他去世于1330年2月24日在比利时福拉安德倫享年63岁，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: and
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Ali, Hossein, Abbas, Behnaz, Gitti, Hamid, Jafar, Mansour, Masoud, Mehdi, Pari, Rana.  Jewish Jechiel, Bracha, Herschel, Morry.
Iranian: from Zand, the name of a dinasty which ruled Persia 1751–94. It is based on Middle Persian zand ‘great, powerful’ and was originally the name of a former Iranian tribe.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Sand  .

variants.name: Sand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Bertel, Ejnar, Lars, Levinus, Nels, Niels, Thor.

English, Danish, Norwegian, Swedish, German, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): topographic name for someone who lived on or near a patch of sandy soil, from the vocabulary word sand (German Sand). As a Swedish name it was often purely ornamental, and as a Jewish artificial. It is also found in France (see 3 below).
English: habitational name from a place such as Send (Surrey) or Sound (Cheshire), named with Middle English sand, sond ‘sand’.

variants.name: Zant
meanings: German: variant of   Zand  .
Dutch: variant of   Van Zandt  .

variants.name: Zandi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Mahmud, Taher, Ahmad, Azi, Bahram, Behzad, Farman, Firooz, Hamid, Hossein, Jaleh, Masood.
Iranian: derivative of   Zand  , denoting descent from or association with a Persian dinasty of that name.
Italian (Emilia): perhaps a nickname from the dialect word gianda ‘acorn’.

nameMeanings.name: Flandres
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Fleming
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

variants.name: Jeane
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jean .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I was born in 1267, in Namur, Belgium, his father, Guy de Dampierre, was 42 and his mother, Isabelle de Luxembourg, was 20. He married Marie d'Artois on 6 March 1310, in Archdiocese of Paris, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He registered for military service in 1302. In 1302, his occupation is listed as regent of flanders . He died on 24 February 1330, in Flanders, Belgium, at the age of 63, and was buried in Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I est né en 1267, à Diocèse de Namur, Belgique, son père, Guy de Dampierre, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Luxembourg, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Marie d'Artois le 6 mars 1310, à Archidiocèse de Paris, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1302. En 1302, sa profession de son indiquée est regent of flanders . Il est décédé le 24 février 1330, à Flandre, Belgique, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I 1267 in Bistum Namur, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guy de Dampierre 42 und seine Mutter Isabelle de Luxembourg 20. Er hat am 6. März 1310 in Archidiocèse de Paris, Frankreich Marie d'Artois geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er hat sich 1302 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1302 ist sein Beruf als regent of flanders  aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. Februar 1330 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Vlaanderen, Belgien und wurde in Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I è nato il nel 1267 nel Diocèse de Namur, Belgio, il suo padre, Guy de Dampierre, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Isabelle de Luxembourg, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Marie d'Artois il 6 marzo 1310, nel Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 3 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1302. Nel 1302, la sua occupazione è indicata come regent of flanders . Morì il 24 febbraio 1330, nel Vlaanderen, Belgio, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Dampierre and Flandres Iが1267年にベルギーディオクeゼ ド ナムルで生まれた時，父Guy de Dampierreは42歳，母Isabelle de Luxembourgは20歳であった。1310年3月6日にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド パーイスでMarie d'Artoisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年に兵役登録をした。1302年，職業はregent of flanders と記録されている。彼は1330年2月24日にベルギーvラアンデレンで63歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I(이)가 1267년 벨기에 디오ce스 데 남어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guy de Dampierre(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabelle de Luxembourg(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1310년 3월 6일 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 파리스에서 Marie d'Artois(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1302년, 그의 직업은 regent of flanders 이었다. 그는 1330년 2월 24일 벨기에 블라아더에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I nasceu em 1267, em Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, seu pai, Guy de Dampierre, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Luxembourg, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie d'Artois em 6 de março de 1310, em Archidiocèse de Paris, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1302. Em 1302, sua profissão aparece como regent of flanders . Ele faleceu em 24 de fevereiro de 1330, em Vlaanderen, Bélgica, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I родился в 1267 г. в местности диокeс де намур, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Guy de Dampierre было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Luxembourg, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie d'Artois 6 марта 1310 г. в местности арчидиокeс де пэрис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1302 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1302 годуработал по профессии regent of flanders . Он умер 24 февраля 1330 г. в местности влаандирен, Бельгия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Dampierre and Flandres I nació en 1267, en Diocèse de Namur, Bélgica, su papá, Guy de Dampierre, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Luxembourg, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Marie d'Artois el 6 de marzo de 1310, en Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1302. En 1302, su ocupación registrada era regent of flanders . Murió el 24 de febrero de 1330, en Vlaanderen, Bélgica, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
